mapper.select: SELECT oi.order_item_id AS orderItemId, o.orders_id AS ordersId, p.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, pt.product_url AS imgUrl, s.size_name AS sizeName, c.color_name AS colorName, oi.quantity AS quantity FROM order_item_tb oi JOIN orders_tb o ON oi.orders_id = o.orders_id JOIN product_tb p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, MIN(product_url) AS product_url FROM product_thumbnail_tb GROUP BY product_id ) pt ON p.product_id = pt.product_id JOIN size_tb s ON oi.size_id = s.size_id JOIN stock_tb st ON oi.color_id = st.color_id AND oi.product_id = st.product_id AND oi.size_id = st.size_id JOIN color_tb c ON st.color_id = c.color_id JOIN user_tb u ON o.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.email = #{email} AND o.status = '배송완료' AND oi.order_item_id NOT IN ( SELECT order_item_id FROM review_tb WHERE user_id = ( SELECT user_id FROM user_tb WHERE email = #{email} ) ) ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_tb (product_id, order_item_id, user_id, content, created_at) SELECT oi.product_id, #{orderItemId}, u.user_id, #{content}, NOW() FROM order_item_tb oi JOIN orders_tb o ON oi.orders_id = o.orders_id JOIN user_tb u ON o.user_id = u.user_id WHERE oi.order_item_id = #{orderItemId} AND u.email = #{email}
mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, p.product_name AS productName, pt.product_url AS imgUrl, r.content, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM review_tb r JOIN product_tb p ON r.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, MIN(product_url) AS product_url FROM product_thumbnail_tb GROUP BY product_id ) pt ON p.product_id = pt.product_id JOIN user_tb u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.email = #{email} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
